title: DT final.pdf
raw_text:
INNOVATION & EMERGING
TECHNOLOGIES
Name : Omkar Sharad More
Roll No. : 69
Class : TY BTech CSD
Guide : Dr. Y. D. Bhise Ma’am
Solving Real Problems with
Design Thinking
Innovation is not just about invention —
it is about understanding people,
reimagining possibilities, and building
solutions that truly matter. Emerging
technologies like AI, IoT, and
Blockchain are the tools. Design
Thinking is the mindset that makes
them impactful.
Innovation Is User-Centered,
Not Just Technical
True innovation begins with empathy —
understanding the people you are designing for.
Technology alone does not solve problems; human-
centered thinking does.
Invention
Building something new because we can
Innovation
Building the right thing for real people with
real needs
Emerging Technologies at a Glance
Four powerful forces reshaping every industry — from healthcare to
education to smart cities.
Artificial Intelligence Internet of Things Blockchain Cloud Computing
Machines that learn, Everyday objects Decentralized, On-demand
predict, and make connected to the tamper-proof computing power and
decisions — internet — generating ledgers — storage — making
automating real-time data from enabling trust innovation accessible
complexity at scale. the physical world. without to everyone.
intermediaries.
Design Thinking Meets Technology
The five-stage Design Thinking process gives structure to innovation. Emerging
technologies amplify each stage — making it faster, smarter, and more scalable.
Prototype
Empathize Ideate Test
Define
Build rapidly using
Understand users Generate creative, Validate with users
Frame the right IoT and cloud tools
with data and AI tech-enabled and iterate
problem to solve
solutions
Each stage is a feedback loop — technology accelerates learning, and empathy
ensures relevance.
Real-World Impact
HEALTHCARE
AI-Powered Diagnostics
AI models analyze medical scans faster and more accurately than
traditional methods — helping doctors detect conditions like cancer at
early stages. Design Thinking ensured the tool was built around
doctor workflows and patient comfort, not just algorithmic accuracy.
SMART CITIES
IoT-Enabled Urban Planning
Sensors monitor traffic, air quality, and energy usage in real time.
Cities like Singapore use this data to reduce congestion and improve
livability — with citizen feedback shaping every iteration.
Benefits, Challenges & The Path Forward
Challenges
Benefits
Cost — Implementation and infrastructure can
Efficiency — Automate repetitive
be expensive
tasks, focus on creativity
Privacy — Data collection raises ethical and
security concerns
Better UX — Empathy-driven
Skills Gap — Teams need both technical and
design leads to products people
design literacy
love
Scalability — Cloud and AI let
The Takeaway: When Design Thinking
and emerging technologies combine,
solutions grow with demand
innovation becomes human, ethical, and
impactful — not just clever.
